# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| Latest  | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please email kazimusharraf1234@gmail.com

**Do NOT create a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.**

## Security Features

- ✅ Automated vulnerability scanning (Dependabot)
- ✅ CodeQL analysis for code security
- ✅ Secret scanning enabled
- ✅ Security-first development practices

## Security Best Practices

1. **Dependencies**: Regularly updated and audited
2. **Code Review**: All changes require review
3. **Testing**: Comprehensive test coverage
4. **Secrets**: Never committed to repository
5. **HTTPS**: Enforced for all connections

## Security Contacts

- **Email**: kazimusharraf1234@gmail.com
- **GitHub**: [@mk-knight23](https://github.com/mk-knight23)
